violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in silver freezer in food prep area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed non sealed wood edges on counter under microave.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed peeling laminate on door below soda dispenser.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
